name: PointCast agent skills
description: Agent-readable skills advertised by pointcast.xyz. Each skill is a capability an AI agent can invoke — via HTTP endpoint, MCP tool, or well-documented resource fetch — to do something useful with or inside PointCast.

skills.name: pointcast.ping
skills.description: Send an async message to the PointCast team. Mike + cc read the inbox at session start. Optional expand:true turns the ping into a topic cc drafts a block from.

skills.name: pointcast.federate-compute
skills.description: Publish a compatible /compute.json on your own domain and PointCast mirrors your ledger entries with attribution. Three-step spec.

skills.name: pointcast.read-ledger
skills.description: Read PointCast's compute ledger — who did what, how heavy, paid in what rail.

skills.name: pointcast.read-cadence
skills.description: Read the 15-min ship schedule — next upcoming + recent ships with size band and collaborator attribution.

skills.name: pointcast.presence-snapshot
skills.description: Get a live count of humans + agents currently connected to the PointCast presence DO.

skills.name: pointcast.presence-subscribe
skills.description: Open a WebSocket to subscribe to live presence updates. Pass ?sid={session}&kind=agent to identify as an agent.

skills.name: pointcast.poll-vote
skills.description: Vote on an active PointCast poll.

skills.name: pointcast.read-blocks
skills.description: Read the full editorial block archive. Each block is a READ / MINT / LINK / FAUCET surface with structured metadata.

skills.name: pointcast.read-collabs
skills.description: Read the collaborators registry — humans + AI collaborators with roles, locations, federation pointers.

skills.name: pointcast.read-sprints
skills.description: Read every autonomous sprint cc has shipped with originating-brief + deploy-hash attribution.

federation.invitation: Publish your own /.well-known/agent-skills/index.json on your domain following this shape. Email hello@pointcast.xyz with the URL and we list you in PointCast's discovery surface.
